title: Crispy Pork Skewers
description: A deliciously crispy and savory dish inspired by Malaysian cuisine, featuring pork skewers grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Pork shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a lean cut for best results.

ingredients.name: Kecap manis (Malaysian sweet soy sauce)
ingredients.notes: You can substitute with a mixture of soy sauce and honey if unavailable.

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: For brushing the grill or grill pan.

ingredients.name: Toasted coconut flakes
ingredients.notes: Optional but adds a nice flavor and texture.

instructions: Thread pork cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, whisk together kecap manis, vegetable oil, and toasted coconut flakes (if using). Brush the mixture onto both sides of the pork.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork reaches an internal temperature of 145°F. Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
